# open-captable-protocol-daml

This repository contains the OpenCapTable DAML package and npm bindings.

Release automation uses package-scoped tags such as `OpenCapTable-v34-v0.0.2`. Validate a tag with:

```bash
npx tsx scripts/parse-release-tag.ts OpenCapTable-v34-v0.0.2
```

The tag workflow lives at `.github/workflows/release.yml`. It builds, tests, uploads the OpenCapTable DAR to devnet and
mainnet, creates only missing OCP factories, verifies DAR backups, publishes npm, and records generated artifacts back to
main. The workflow fails early if the tag is not current `origin/main` or if the root `package.json` version is already
published. The detailed release process is in `docs/releases/RELEASE_PROCESS.md`.
